title: Strong Cleaning Centrefeed Rolls – for Cleaning & Hygiene - Multipurpose - Ideal for Kitchens, Restrooms, and Offices - Extra Long Centrefeed Roll - White (Pack of 6)
features: GENERAL CLEANING: Our White Centrefeed Roll can be used for dusting surfaces, wiping countertops, cleaning spills, and removing dirt and stains from various surfaces in the home or office, Apart from that our tissue used for Sanitary use, such as bathroom and facial tissue, napkins, paper towels, and wipes, and can be used in sterile medical procedures.

HYGIENE AND PERSONAL CARE: These Centrefeed Roll can be used for personal hygiene purposes, such as wiping hands, face, or body when water and soap are not readily available. It is made from a variety of materials, including wood pulp, recycled paper, and other natural fibers making our Product skin-friendly and best companion for using anytime anywhere!

ELECTRONICS CLEANING: White Centrefeed Rolls are often used to clean screens, monitors, keyboards, and other electronic devices. They are soft and gentle, minimizing the risk of scratching delicate surfaces.

INDUSTRIAL AND AUTOMOTIVE CLEANING: Centrefeed Roll are suitable for industrial applications, including cleaning machinery, tools, and equipment. They can also be used for automotive cleaning tasks like wiping car interiors or removing grease and oil from surfaces.

HEALTHCARE AND HYGIENE FACILITIES: White Centrefeed Rolls are commonly used in healthcare settings, such as hospitals and clinics, for tasks like cleaning medical equipment, surfaces, and patient care.
